lines.speaker: Bryn
lines.text: What are you doing down here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you explain this place to me again?

lines.speaker: Bryn
lines.text: This here is the Gauntlet, the finest creation of the Amlodd clan. It was built years ago to help train Prifddinas' finest warriors and survivalists.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Train?

lines.speaker: Bryn
lines.text: That's right. The Gauntlet contains a range of deadly creatures formed from crystal. Defeating them is the key to victory, but it is no easy task.

lines.speaker: Bryn
lines.text: This is because all participants start with nothing at hand beyond a few basic tools.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But how do people fight without their gear?

lines.speaker: Bryn
lines.text: Resources can be gathered throughout the dungeon. These can be used to create the weapons, armour, food and potions needed to survive.

lines.speaker: Bryn
lines.text: Without any armour, those crystalline creatures can be real nasty. Any armour that you make down there will greatly reduce the damage they do to you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I think I follow... But I thought this was all about combat, not just gathering my own equipment.

lines.speaker: Bryn
lines.text: That's right. Once you feel you're ready, or once we decide that you've spent long enough down there, you'll have to face the fearsome Crystalline Hunllef.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And what makes it so dangerous, if it's just for training?

lines.speaker: Bryn
lines.text: Once you go down there, there are only two ways out... You can make a break for the exit, or if you're bested in combat we'll send someone in for you.

lines.speaker: Bryn
lines.text: Things can be a little unstable down there at times, too... Everything gets corrupted, and it might be a little frightening, but it makes for a good challenge.

lines.speaker: Bryn
lines.text: I think that covers it... Everything else, you'll have to work out for yourself while you're in there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay... I think I've got it.

lines.speaker: Bryn
lines.text: You can always come back and ask me to go over things again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm thinking of giving the Gauntlet a go.

lines.speaker: Bryn
lines.text: You? Attempting the Gauntlet? If you say so!

sections.title: Attemping to enter the Gauntlet without talking to Bryn first

lines.speaker: Bryn
lines.text: Don't think you want to be heading down there without knowing what you're getting into! Come and see me, if you really want to go down there.

sections.title: Attemping to enter the Gauntlet while having a pet out

lines.speaker: Bryn
lines.text: Don't think you can be taking any plus ones down there with you.

sections.title: Attempting to enter the Gauntlet when a reward is waiting in the chest

lines.speaker: Bryn
lines.text: There's something in that there chest waiting for you. Don't leave it for too long.

sections.title: Attempting to enter the Gauntlet while in combat with another player in Deadman

lines.speaker: Bryn
lines.text: Hey! Finish your fight before you come in here!

sections.title: Completing the Gauntlet for the first time

lines.speaker: Bryn
lines.text: You know, if things start getting comfortable down there, things can be a little unstable at times.

lines.speaker: Bryn
lines.text: It might be a little frightening, but it makes for a good challenge!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe I'll check it out at some point!

lines.speaker: Bryn
lines.text: What are you doing down here?

lines.speaker: Bryn
lines.text: This here is the Gauntlet, the finest creation of the Amlodd clan. It was built years ago to help train Prifddinas' finest warriors and survivalists.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Just passing by.

lines.speaker: Bryn
lines.text: Alright... Well be careful down here. I've got my eye on you.
